remaining_tasks.name: Implement automated install.sh and docker push logic

decisions.decision: Use calib.dev registry for Docker images
decisions.rationale: It's the company's self-hosted GitLab registry.
Ensures all remote instances send logs to the central developer deck automatically.

next_action: Run /gsd:plan-phase 5 to formalize the implementation plan for Phase 5.
context_notes: We just finished a design spec for the Docker distribution and one-command installer. Milestone v1.0 was completed and pushed. Now we are ready to implement the new Phase 5 distribution pipeline.
